name: harness
description: feedback-blockers, reasoning-gaps, and setup commands for harness engineering, plus task-list-builder, task-list-runner, and task-list-viewer skills for producing, executing, and inspecting structured task lists, and an autonomous skill that drives a single issue/ticket link to an opened pull request with no human in the loop. Analyze code for feedback-loop blockers and AI reasoning gaps, build a paired JSON+markdown plan, drive it to completion via sequential foreground Agent calls, inspect any active plan read-only, or take a single issue link end-to-end to a PR. Includes a PreToolUse hook that auto-approves invocations of the bundled task_list_cli.py — a JSON task-list mutator under docs/exec-plans/active/ that also runs the file's verifySteps as subprocesses (the `verify` subcommand). (PostToolUse linting hooks moved to the separate linting-hooks plugin.)
